English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Michael Latham papers
Latham, Michael C.
World Health Organization
29-2-3928
38 cubic feet. 38 cubic feet.
1950-2010. Correspondence, printed materials, publications Correspondence, publications, reports, and subject files concerning Latham's work as a professor in the Division of Nutritional Sciences and his work in international nutrition. Collection material in English 7589891
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Eileen Keating
Date completed:
October 2012
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, February 2013
Date modified:
RMC Staff, October 2018
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Professor emeritus in the Division of Nutritional Sciences, Cornell University from 1968-2004 and Director of the Cornell Program in International Nutrition for 25 years.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence, publications, reports, and subject files concerning Latham's work as a professor in the Division of Nutritional Sciences and his work in international nutrition, focusing on breastfeeding, infant and child health; parasitic infections and their relationship to health, nutrition, human rights and the World Health Organization.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Biographical Box 31
Series II. Correspondence Box 1-14, 35, 36
Series III. Conference Papers, Consulting Reports, Lectures – in chronological order Box 15-25
Series IV. Course Material Box 31-35
Series V. Subject Files Box 26-31, 36
Series VI. Publications Box 27,37, 38
Series VII. Visual Images, Cassette Tapes, Films Box 36
Cite As:
Michael Latham papers, #29-2-3928. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Access Restrictions:
Access to Boxes 1-14 restricted during the lifetime of the correspondent or by the permission of the correspondent AND the Director of the Division of Nutritional Sciences
Related Materials
See also collections #47-10-3394 and #29-1-3247 for additional biographical information.
Mothers. Nutrition. Advertising -- Baby foods -- Developing countries. Lactation -- Study and teaching -- Developing countries. Infants -- Nutrition -- Study and teaching Infants -- Nutrition. Breastfeeding -- Developing countries. Breastfeeding -- Africa, Sub-Saharan. Diet -- Africa. Latham, Michael C. Cornell University -- : Faculty. Cornell University. Graduate School of Nutrition

Scope and Contents
A film about the tragedy of infant feeding practices in the third world. The film is 26 minutes, was directed by Peter Krieg, produced in Kenya and distributed by Unifilm, of New York City.Computer data -magnetic tape-labeled Henry Leeno dates36 ======= Series I. Scope and Contents
A film about the tragedy of infant feeding practices in the third world. The film is 26 minutes, was directed by Peter Krieg, produced in Kenya and distributed by Unifilm, of New York City.Computer data -magnetic tape-labeled Henry Leeno dates36 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
